title: Simply Emerald
description: A lightweight addition that adds emerald tools & armor to a vanilla experience. If copper can have it, why shouldn't emerald?
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d0a47f0e3828b14ff312df05db8ac02b67e981_0.webp) [![Modrinth Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/493ba774d2b9e48d0224ec47a2b19ba83994b2af.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-emerald) [![CurseForge Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1f08f989f139d720f80eec4152aa0c55a8d7b2.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplyemerald) [![NeoForge Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c451a4c61b3de18ebc59ae657713e82cf890293.png)](https://neoforged.net) [![Fabric Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f2bbe24d378d863f70c8b4bf7bf9c0ef2b56f7.png)](https://fabricmc.net/)

# Mod Description **Simply Emerald** is a lightweight addon mod that integrates Emerald armor, tools and a couple other items into your Minecraft experience. It is designed to blend seamlessly into the game and offers regular updates & bugfixes for both newer and older versions of Minecraft. This mod is compatable with NeoForge, Fabric & Forge. Versions older than 1.20.6 require Forge/Fabric while versions newer require NeoForge/Fabric. ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m88tABEh/images/f97092f2192be8cd20ebca3616621f733dfb8b5f.png)
